---
title: "My First Blog Post"
description: "My first ever blog post, creating with R-Ladies SB!"
author: 
  - name: Samantha Shanny-Csik
    url: http://samanthacsik.github.io/
    affiliation: R-Ladies Santa Barbara
    affiliation-url: https://www.meetup.com/rladies-santa-barbara/
date: 2026-05-13
categories: [Quarto, R, R-Ladies]
citation: 
  url: http://samanthacsik.github.io/blog/my-first-blog-post/
image: RLadies_hex.jpeg
draft: true
---

Here is where I will start writing my actual blog post content...
